scripts.desktop: node node_modules/cross-env/src/bin/cross-env.js ELECTRON_DEV=1 node node_modules/concurrently/dist/bin/concurrently.js "npm run dev:renderer -- --port 5173 --strictPort" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.build: npm run build:runtime && npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer && node node_modules/electron-builder/cli.js
scripts.pack:win: npm run build:runtime && npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer && node scripts/pack_win_unpacked.cjs
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:runtime && npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer && node node_modules/electron-builder/cli.js --win --x64
